message:
🌱 Add the-update-framework-tuf-: Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields? mission (#748)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "the-update-framework-tuf-1266-should-we-accept-metadata-that-includes-unrecognis",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "the-update-framework-tuf-: Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?",
+    "description": "Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current the-update-framework-tuf- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your the-update-framework-tuf- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nhelm list -n the-update-framework-tuf- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working the-update-framework-tuf- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the-update-framework-tuf- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant the-update-framework-tuf- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nkubectl get configmap -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=the-update-framework-tuf-\n```\n**Description of issue or feature request**:\n\nThe current reference implementation will ignore unrecognised fields in a metadata file when loading it. Furthermore, some TAPs (i.e."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?",
+        "description": "Please fill in the fields below to submit a pull request.  The more information\nthat is provided, the better.\nEven though, this ADR documents something already implied in the TUF\nspec in [document formats](https://theupdateframework.github.io/specification/latest/#document-formats)\nit seems better to document this decision clearly so that it could be\nreferenced and give an explanation why someone can load a metadata file\nwith additional unrecognized fields.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nkubectl get events -n the-update-framework-tuf- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Should we accept metadata that includes unrecognised fields?\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
